title: I tried Lenovo’s wild modular ThinkBook at MWC, and now my laptop feels outdated
summary: Hands-on with a modular laptop that doesn't feel like a science experiment.
body: Credit: Adamya Sharma / Android Authority Lenovo has a long-standing habit of showing up to MWC with at least one laptop concept that makes you stop in your tracks and double back for a closer look. Usually, those concepts are eye-catching but clearly something that makes you go – “cool, but never happening.” The ThinkBook Transparent Display Laptop we saw back in 2024 was one such futuristic laptop, but at MWC 2026, things felt different.
